Package org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.transformer

Class TrackedPredicate

    equals(Object obj)
    Tells whether the given object is equal to this tracked predicate, that is whether the given object is another tracked predicate that has the same hypothesis status and carries the same predicate.

    • makeHyp

      public static TrackedPredicate makeGoal(Predicate predicate)

    • isHypothesis

      public boolean isHypothesis()
      Description copied from interface: ITrackedPredicate
      Returns whether this predicate is a hypothesis or a goal predicate in its sequent.
      Specified by:
      isHypothesis in interface ITrackedPredicate
      Returns:
      true if this predicate is a hypothesis, false if it is a goal

    • holdsTrivially

      public boolean holdsTrivially()
      Description copied from interface: ITrackedPredicate
      Returns whether this predicate makes its sequent hold trivially. There are two cases where this method returns true :
      • This predicate is a hypothesis and is false.
      • This predicate is a goal and is true.
      Specified by:
      holdsTrivially in interface ITrackedPredicate
      Returns:
      whether this predicate makes its sequent hold trivially

    • isUseful

      public boolean isUseful()
      Returns whether this predicate contributes any information to its sequent.
      Returns:
      whether this predicate is a true hypothesis or false goal

    • getOriginal

      public Predicate getOriginal()
      Description copied from interface: ITrackedPredicate
      Returns the original predicate before any modification.
      Specified by:
      getOriginal in interface ITrackedPredicate
      Returns:
      the original predicate

    • getPredicate

      public Predicate getPredicate()
      Description copied from interface: ITrackedPredicate
      Returns the modified predicate.
      Specified by:
      getPredicate in interface ITrackedPredicate
      Returns:
      the modified predicate

    • transform

      public TrackedPredicate transform(ISequentTransformer transformer)
      Returns a new tracked predicate by applying the given transformer to this predicate.

      In case the transformer did no transformation and returned the exact same predicate, this method returns this tracked predicate, rather than an identical copy of it.

      Parameters:
      transformer - operation to apply to this predicate
      Returns:
      a possibly new tracked predicate with the same origin as this one or null

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object

    • hashCode

      public int hashCode()
      Overrides:
      hashCode in class Object

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object obj)
      Description copied from interface: ITrackedPredicate
      Tells whether the given object is equal to this tracked predicate, that is whether the given object is another tracked predicate that has the same hypothesis status and carries the same predicate. The original predicate is not part of the comparison, so that two tracked predicates are considered equal even when they differ on their original predicate.
      Specified by:
      equals in interface ITrackedPredicate
      Overrides:
      equals in class Object
      Parameters:
      obj - another object with which to compare.
      Returns:
      true iff the given object is considered equal to this tracked predicate
